roa.docketEntryComment: Felony Plea Hearing Transcript
Probation Order
Minute Order
Probation End Date is 06-07-2023
Motion to Reduce Felony to Misdemeanor PC §17(b)
Held to Answer
PD'S MOTION TO RELEASE DEFENSE SUBPOENAED DOCUMENTS FILED
DA INFO FILED
PRELIM HRG TX E-FILED
PRELIM HRG TX VOL 2 -EFILED

/CAL:SENTENCING/X:THE HONORABLE ERIC FLEMING STANDS-IN FOR THE HONORABLE STEPHEN MURPHY, FOR PURPOSES OF THIS SENTENCING AND PURSUANT TO AN ARBUCKLEWAIVER AT THE TIME OF THE PLEA/AJW/CH2:ISS:PROB 2 Y:PJ 4 D/CTS:4/IND/WS/WEAP/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/VF4:300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/SUSFF/DEF:IS ADMONISHEDBY THE COURT THAT AS A CONVICTED FELON HE IS PROHIBITED FROM OWNING, POSSESSING OR HAVING UNDER HIS CARE, CUSTODY OR CONTROL, ANY DANGEROUS OR DEADLYWEAPON, INCLUDING FIREARMS, AMMUNITION AND AMMUNITION LOADING DEVICES, FORTHE REMAINDER OF HIS LIFE,/DEF:IS ADVISED THAT HE MAY PETITION THE COURTAFTER 6 MONTHS TO  REDUCE THE FELONY CHARGE TO A MISDEMEANOR PROVIDED HE HAS SUFFERED NO NEW ARRESTS LEADING TO FORMAL CHARGES BEING FILED AGAINST HIM,/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO APD BY THE CLOSE OF BUSINESS TOMORROW, JUNE 8, 2022/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/X:AS TO COUNT 1:/DEF: IS GIVEN A STRAIGHT SENTENCE OF 4 DAYS IN COUNTY JAIL WITH  CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED OF 4 DAYS,/X:THERE IS NO PROBATION TIME ON COUNT 1/CONTD:STATUS OF REDUCTION OF FELONY TO A MISDEMEANOR/DOPU:ATTORNEY APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT/

/CAL: TRIAL/X: ORAL MOTION BY THE PEOPLE TO AMEND THE INFORMATION AS FOLLOWS:/X: COUNT 1 REDUCED TO MISDEMEANOR 246,3(A)PC/X: ORAL MOTION IS GRANTED/IRR/FAW/VD: 05-24-22 PRETRIAL/DEFT ADV RTS: 1/X: PROPOSED DISPO:/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:   6/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 6-6-22/PPRF /REMA/ARBUCKLE/DOP/

/CAL: TRIAL/X: CLERK ANGEVIC AGDEPPA/X: COURT REPORTER GINA KESSLER CSR #8136/DAWT/X: PER COUNSEL THERE IS A DISPOSITION/X: COUNSEL REQUESTED TOCONTINUE THE CASE TO 05-17-22/X: PEOPLE REQUESTED TO SET CASE AT 130PM ON05-17-22/CONTD: TRIAL & POSSIBLE DISPOSITION/DOPC/
/CAL: TRIAL, LD 08-06-21 (COVID19)/DAWT/CO: THIS CASE IS ASSIGNED TO JUDGE MURPHY, DEPARTMENT 13, FORTHWITH AT 1:30PM, FOR TRIAL AND FOR ALL PURPOSES/X: FUTURE DATE 05-24-22 CONFIRMED/

/CAL:DEFENSE MOTION TO RELEASE SUBPOENAED DOCS, LD 08-06-21 (COVID-19)/TE:2 WEEKS/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:SDT #1 RECEIVED& RELEASED TO DEFENSE ON 12-09-21,  FUTURE JURY TRIAL DATE OF 02-10-22 ISCONFIRMED/

/CAL:CONT'D PRELIM HEARING/HTA1: #1, #2, #3, #5, #6, AND #7/X:DEFENDANT REMAINS ON ACM/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/CONTD: ARRAIGNMENT IN DEPT, 22 ON 06-07-21/

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/X: DEFENSE MOTION TO EXCLUDE WITNESSES:/MO GRTD//X:  THE PEOPLE DISMISS THE CHARGES IN COUNTS 4 AND 8 PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1385- LACK OF EVIDENCE,/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN: OFFICER RAYMOND BIAGINI/WIT SWORN: OFFICER BAYLON YEE/WIT SWORN: OFFICER JOSEMACIAS/WIT SWORN: SERGEANT CARLA HURLEY/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S 1- CERTIFIED CIIFOR QUIN JOHNSON/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S 2- MAP OF BAYVIEW AREA/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S3- VIDEO SURVEILLANCE 1492 EGBERT/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S 3A- VIDEO #1 CH04-00000//EXHMA: PEOPLE'S 3B- VIDEO #2 CH05-95959/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S 4- VIDEO WATCHTOWER SURVEILLANCE  2021-02-26 22:36:33-22:37:12/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S 5- PHOTO OFDIRTBIKES/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S 6- PHOTO OF MAGAZINE/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S 7- PHOTO OF HANDGUN/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING IN PROGRESS/CTORD: DEFENDANT MAY APPEAR VIA ZOOM OR HIS COUNSEL MAY APPEAR ON HIS BEHALF/
